inputs.prompt: Newsletter: The Craft. Description: Weekly newsletter about the business of writing — freelance rates, contract red flags, negotiation tactics. Inactive threshold: No opens in 90 days. Voice: Direct, practical, slightly cynical. Recent standout: An edition that published the actual fee schedules of 15 major publications, sourced from freelancers. Sequence: Two emails.
Newsletter: Daily Science Brief. Inactive threshold: No opens in 60 days. Voice: Clear, enthusiastic. Sequence: Single email.

Newsletter: European Housing Watch. Description: Fortnightly analysis of housing policy across EU member states. Inactive threshold: No opens in 120 days (6 missed editions). Voice: Analytical, evidence-based. Recent standout: An edition mapping every European city where rental prices have exceeded 40% of median income, with original data visualization. Sequence: Two emails. Consequence: Subscribers who do not re-engage will be removed from the list.
